post.subject: I cant feel my face...
post.body: I actually couldnt feel my face last night. It was so damn weird! I couldnt feel the inside of my mouth with my tounge, I couldnt taste the coke I was drinking going into my mouth. It was so weird. When I moved it felt like time was going really slowly. I wasnt sure if i moved or not, my eyes where having trouble cathing up with my movements. I sat there staring at the Winamp Visualisations and listening to whatever music we were listening to which was really really good. I was thinking so much. About my life and relationship with others it was so damn weird and scary.
